_comment: Ground-truth program facts. Hand-verified only — bots and AI prompts read this file, never write it. null = not yet verified (see NEEDS-VERIFICATION.md). Every generated story is checked against these facts and rejected on contradiction.
stadium: Darrell K Royal–Texas Memorial Stadium (Austin, TX)

unverified.note: Live stories name two different DCs; data/roster.json says Kwiatkowski, most AI stories say Muschamp. Field stays null until hand-confirmed. Until then no story may attribute the DC (or OC) role to any named person.
